method_takeaways: Use markerless pose estimation + kinematic feature extraction
Use biomechanical priors for interpretable indicators
Validate with expert scoring correlation and sensitivity analysis
notes: CNKI/WoS direct retrieval unavailable in current pipeline; using OpenAlex as open substitute.
